creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Sun Mar 30 10:59:46 2014
New Revision: 349612
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349612
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349612/

Log:
  devel/py-Jinja2: Update to 2.7.2
  
  - Update to 2.7.2
  - Remove deprecated OPTIONSFILE variable.
  
  Changes:
  
      http://github.com/mitsuhiko/jinja2/blob/2.7.2/CHANGES
  
  PR:		ports/187272
  Submitted by:	Johannes Jost Meixner <xmj@chaot.net>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (>2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-Jinja2/Makefile
  head/devel/py-Jinja2/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-Jinja2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-Jinja2/Makefile	Sun Mar 30 10:50:26 2014	(r349611)
+++ head/devel/py-Jinja2/Makefile	Sun Mar 30 10:59:46 2014	(r349612)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Jinja2
-PORTVERSION=	2.7.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.7.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -24,7 +23,6 @@ PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 EXAMPLESDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/examples/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}
 
-OPTIONSFILE=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
 OPTIONS_DEFINE?=	BABEL EXAMPLES SPEEDUPS
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT?=	BABEL SPEEDUPS
 SPEEDUPS_DESC=	Enable speedups

Modified: head/devel/py-Jinja2/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-Jinja2/distinfo	Sun Mar 30 10:50:26 2014	(r349611)
+++ head/devel/py-Jinja2/distinfo	Sun Mar 30 10:59:46 2014	(r349612)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Jinja2-2.7.1.tar.gz) = 5cc0a087a81dca1c08368482fb7a92fe2bdd8cfbb22bc0fccfe6c85affb04c8b
-SIZE (Jinja2-2.7.1.tar.gz) = 377813
+SHA256 (Jinja2-2.7.2.tar.gz) = 310a35fbccac3af13ebf927297f871ac656b9da1d248b1fe6765affa71b53235
+SIZE (Jinja2-2.7.2.tar.gz) = 378300
